seo.title: Run for the Oceans — BEATROX Experiential Design
seo.description: An interactive ocean-awareness media experience created for Adidas and Parley Ocean School at Domino Park, Brooklyn. Custom shipping container build with infinity LED walls and LIDAR-driven real-time simulations.

og.title: Run for the Oceans — Adidas x Parley Ocean School
og.description: An immersive shipping container turned deep-ocean environment — LIDAR sensors, infinity LED walls, and real-time fish simulations in Brooklyn.

hero.headline: Run for the Oceans
hero.subheadline: An immersive interactive experience raising awareness about plastic waste in our oceans — powered by LIDAR, LED video, and real-time simulation.

metadata.type: Interactive Media Experience, Event Production, Marathon Activation, Infinity Mirror

body.heading: Design Objective
body.content: To create an interactive and educational experience for attendees of the Parley Ocean School x Adidas annual 5k marathon event. The goal was to raise awareness about the impact of plastic waste in the ocean, while also providing an immersive and entertaining experience.

body.heading: Design Concept
body.content:
A custom shipping container build was used to create an immersive environment that resembled a deep chamber within the ocean. The container was fitted with seamless wall-to-wall video panels and mirror surfaces for the floor and ceiling to create an infinity mirror effect.

The interactive experience used scanning LIDAR sensors to track the participants' movements and touch interactions, and this data was used to drive a real-time visualization of flocking fish and a fluid simulation. A collage of information and footage about the deep ocean and plastic waste was also displayed on the screens.
Interactive Infinity & Media Tunnel — Event Production at its most immersive.
